title: Master's Program in Media and Cultural Studies Publications and Dissertations
content:
Master's Program in Media and Cultural Studies Publications and Dissertations

NATIONAL AND INTERNATIONAL ARTICLES

SineFilozofi Journal 5th International Cinema and Philosophy Symposium Full Text Book

. 22-36.

Etkileşim Dergisi

. Issue 10, October 2022.
